ham.subject: Your Amazon Order is Confirmed! Order #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been successfully placed and is now being processed.

Order Details:
• Item: Kindle Paperwhite – 8GB
• Quantity: 1
• Price: $129.99
• Shipping Address: 1234 Elm Street, Springfield, IL 62704

Estimated Delivery: 3–5 business days

If you have any questions or need to modify your order, please reply to this email or visit your account on <URL>.

Thank you for choosing Amazon!

Best regards,
Amazon.com Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Request
spam.body:
Dear Finance Team,

I need your immediate assistance with an urgent matter. A client has requested a gift card as a thank‑you for a large order. Please process a $500 Visa gift card and send it to the following address:

123 Business Way
Suite 400
New York, NY 10001

This is a high‑priority request and must be completed by the end of the day to avoid any potential loss of revenue. Please confirm once the card has been dispatched.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best,
Robert L. Thompson
Chief Executive Officer
